summary: Iteration 35 — Backend-only catalog repair verification. All 44 tests PASSED (100%). Product catalog has exactly 162 products with 0 empty/null images. CLIO Platinum 50K Kit (product/2810) and Pod (product/2816) use correctly differentiated CDN images. All 8 CLR 50K products use the correct BigCommerce product/2822 CDN URL. All 23 new products verified: RIA NV30K Blue Razz Ice, 3 new CLR 50K flavors, 5 Nera Fullview PODs, 3 Nera Fullview Kits, 5 Geek Bar Pulse flavors. No duplicate product names. Fallback image (https://clouddistrict.club/placeholder.png) correctly returned by resolve_image() for null-image products. All CDN images are HTTPS URLs. 25 legacy /api/uploads/ products remain (acceptable per spec for VIHO, RX50K, Switch Ultra, etc.).

minor.note: auth/login endpoint uses 'identifier' field (not 'email'). Previous test file test_admin_products.py uses 'email' which would fail. Updated new test to use 'identifier'.
minor.issue: Field name is 'identifier' not 'email'. Other existing test files may be broken.

critical_code_review_comments: resolve_image() in product_routes.py correctly handles None/empty image and returns fallback URL — verified by direct MongoDB insertion test.
_build_product() correctly applies resolve_image() on both GET /api/products (list) and GET /api/products/{id} (single) — both verified.
ProductCreate schema enforces image min_length=1, preventing empty string images from being created via API — this is CORRECT behavior and complements the MongoDB-level fallback.
Note: ProductUpdate.image is Optional[str] = None but update_product() filters out None values (v is not None), meaning you cannot clear an image via PATCH — intentional design.
auth/login uses 'identifier' field (accepts email or username). Other existing test files (test_admin_products.py) that use 'email' field will fail auth — minor inconsistency.
seed_data_creation: Temporary test product inserted into MongoDB directly for fallback image test (TEST_FALLBACK_IMAGE_PRODUCT) — cleaned up after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35: Catalog repair fully verified. All 44 backend tests pass. 162 products, 0 empty images, CLIO Kit/Pod differentiated correctly, CLR 50K all have CDN images, all new products exist, fallback image works. DB_NAME=test_database, backend URL=https://cloudz-loyalty-dev.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth uses 'identifier' field (not 'email'). 25 legacy /api/uploads/ images remain (acceptable). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_catalog_repair.py.
